labels.ideal_content_profile: Big emotional life-moment storytelling — proposals, weddings, reunions; wide landscape reveals into intimate reaction close-ups.
Drone landscape reveals, slow coastal b-roll, wide ambient shots.
Slow handheld emotional moments — couples, candid embraces, intimate hand details.
Wedding-day montages — getting ready, first looks, reception celebrations.
Drone footage with rhythmic synth pulses; landscape b-roll with cool atmospherics.
Street fashion, swagger walks, fast cuts.
